---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Type '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or paste browser console errors.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome 130, Safari 18]
- **Node version**: [e.g., 20.11]
- **Supabase plan**: [Free / Pro / Self-hosted]

## Edge function logs

If the issue involves chat or AI features, include relevant logs:

```
npx supabase functions logs unified-chat --project-ref YOUR_REF
```

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem.
